title: Cut vs Bulk: Which One Are You?

slides_data.prompt: Split screen dark aesthetic: left side lean physique with cool blue tones, right side muscular physique with warm coral tones, VS graphic in center with violet glow, dramatic lighting, 4:5
slides_data.headline: CUT vs BULK

slides_data.prompt: Clean dark infographic showing downward arrow with deficit numbers, lean athletic body silhouette, cool blue and violet color scheme, minimal data visualization, 4:5
slides_data.headline: CUTTING
slides_data.body:
Goal: Lose body fat, keep muscle.
Calorie deficit: 300-500 cal below maintenance.
Protein: Stay HIGH (2g/kg minimum).
Cardio: Moderate, don't overdo it.
Timeline: 8-16 weeks.

slides_data.prompt: Clean dark infographic showing upward arrow with surplus numbers, muscular body silhouette, warm coral and violet color scheme, minimal data visualization, 4:5
slides_data.headline: BULKING
slides_data.body:
Goal: Build muscle, controlled weight gain.
Calorie surplus: 200-400 cal above maintenance.
Protein: 1.8-2.2g/kg.
Training: Progressive overload is king.
Timeline: 12-24 weeks.

slides_data.prompt: Dark premium decision tree flowchart with glowing nodes, body fat percentage indicators, violet and coral connected pathways, clean infographic, 4:5
slides_data.headline: HOW TO CHOOSE
slides_data.body:
Body fat above 20% (men) / 30% (women)? → CUT FIRST
Body fat under 15% (men) / 23% (women)? → BULK
In between? → Either works. Pick your priority.
Been cutting 16+ weeks? → Maintenance break.

slides_data.prompt: Side by side comparison: messy dirty bulk plate vs clean lean bulk plate, dark background, one with red X one with green check, dramatic food photography, 4:5
slides_data.headline: BIGGEST MISTAKES
slides_data.body:
Cut too hard → muscle loss, binge cycles
Bulk too fast → unnecessary fat gain
No tracking → guessing = no results
No protein priority → wasted effort

slides_data.prompt: Phone showing Cals2Gains app switching between Cut and Bulk mode with smooth animation, dark premium UI, violet and coral mode indicators, 4:5
slides_data.headline: SWITCH MODES INSTANTLY
slides_data.body:
Cals2Gains has dedicated Cut and Bulk modes.
AI adjusts your calories and macros automatically.
Switch when you're ready — the app adapts with you.

slides_data.prompt: Bold split design: CUT and BULK text with arrow pointing to Cals2Gains logo in center, dark premium with violet and coral gradient, powerful, 4:5
slides_data.headline: PICK YOUR MODE
slides_data.body: Start your cut or bulk with AI guidance. Free 7 days.
